channel.title: Yuehan Qin | 秦月菡
channel.description: Recent content on Yuehan Qin | 秦月菡

item.description: class Me: def __init__(self): self.name = "Yuehan Qin" self.email = "yuehanqi@usc.edu" self.location = "Los Angeles, CA"

item.title: Publications
item.description: Google Scholar Preprints: M3OOD: Automatic Selection of Multimodal OOD Detectors. Yuehan Qin, Li Li, Defu Cao, Tiankai Yang, Yue Zhao. ClimateLLM: Efficient Weather Forecasting via Frequency-Aware Large Language Models. Shixuan Li†, Wei Yang†, Peiyu Zhang, Xiongye Xiao, Defu Cao, Yuehan Qin, Xiaole Zhang, Yue Zhao, Paul Bogdan. A Personalized Conversational Benchmark: Towards Simulating Personalized Conversations. Li Li, Peilin Cai, Ryan A Rossi, Franck Dernoncourt, Branislav Kveton, Junda Wu, Tong Yu, Linxin Song, Tiankai Yang, Yuehan Qin, Nesreen K Ahmed, Samyadeep Basu, Subhojyoti Mukherjee, Ruiyi Zhang, Zhengmian Hu, Bo Ni, Yuxiao Zhou, Zichao Wang, Yue Huang, Yu Wang, Xiangliang Zhang, Philip S Yu, Xiyang Hu, Yue Zhao.
